# Ruler Agent — main hierarchy top

The Ruler is the sole main agent. Workers report up; only the Ruler speaks to users via ElevenLabs.

## Acceptance criteria

- [x] `packages/agents/ruler-agent.md` defines hierarchy and policies
- [x] `convex/lib/agent-hierarchy.ts` with AGENTS constants
- [x] `createAudit` logs `ruler` delegate event
- [ ] Hermes skill routes all user interaction through Ruler

## Labels

`buildathon`, `layer-hierarchy`, `partner-hermes`
